use_cases: Selecting a single option from a predefined list of values in forms
Framework or technology selection in project setup interfaces
Filtering data by category in dashboard or admin interfaces
Form data collection for user preferences or settings
Dropping down to choose from options in any data-entry scenario
ai_summary: A select dropdown component built with Ark UI featuring dark mode support and portal-based dropdown positioning. The component renders a styled trigger button with chevron indicator and displays selectable items in a positioned content overlay with group labels. Designed for single-option selection in forms with clean flat styling and accessibility features.
